params.delta: The caller's balance delta after adding liquidity; the sum of principal delta, fees accrued, and hook delta
params.feesAccrued: The fees accrued since the last time fees were collected from this position
params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the liquidity provider to be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the add liquidity call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook
returns._1: BalanceDelta The hook's delta in token0 and token1. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency

params.amount0: The amount of token0 being donated
params.amount1: The amount of token1 being donated
params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the donor to be be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the donate call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook

params.key: The key for the pool being initialized
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the initialize call
params.sqrtPriceX96: The sqrt(price) of the pool as a Q64.96
params.tick: The current tick after the state of a pool is initialized

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook

params.delta: The caller's balance delta after removing liquidity; the sum of principal delta, fees accrued, and hook delta

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook
returns._1: BalanceDelta The hook's delta in token0 and token1. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency

params.delta: The amount owed to the caller (positive) or owed to the pool (negative)
params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the swapper to be be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the swap call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook
returns._1: int128 The hook's delta in unspecified currency. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency

returns._1: BeforeSwapDelta The hook's delta in specified and unspecified currencies. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency
returns._2: uint24 Optionally override the lp fee, only used if three conditions are met: 1. the Pool has a dynamic fee, 2. the value's 2nd highest bit is set (23rd bit, 0x400000), and 3. the value is less than or equal to the maximum fee (1 million)

calculateExpectedOutputFromSelling(uint2.details: Prefers the terminal store's `previewCashOutFrom` simulation so sell-side estimates can incorporate cash-out data-hook effects when the underlying store supports that surface. If previewing is unavailable or reverts, this helper intentionally returns `0` and makes the JB sell route ineligible. That conservative degrade rule avoids routing through JB on a stale static reclaim estimate that may disagree with the terminal's live cash-out path.NOTE: Fee calls are best-effort. If the terminal does not expose `FEE()`, this falls back to raw preview.

params.outputToken: The token to receive (e.g., ETH, USDC)
params.terminal: The terminal from which the selling is happening.
params.tokenAmountIn: The amount of JB tokens to sell

returns.expectedOutput: The expected amount of output tokens received

calculateExpectedTokensWithCurrency(uint.details: WARNING: This estimate uses the ruleset's static weight. If the project has a data hook that overrides the weight at payment time, actual token issuance may differ from this helper's output.This helper is intentionally more permissive than live routing. `_beforeSwap()` only trusts `previewPayFor()` for buy-side best-execution decisions and uses this helper as an offchain/reference surface.

params.paymentAmount: The amount to pay (in the token's native decimals)

returns.expectedTokens: The expected number of tokens to be received

params.prices: The Juicebox prices contract for currency conversion

observe((address,address,uint24,int24,ad.details: Implements the IGeomeanOracle interface so external contracts (e.g. buyback hooks) can query this pool's TWAP without maintaining their own oracle.

params.secondsAgos: Array of time periods (in seconds) to look back

returns.secondsPerLiquidityCumulativeX128s: Cumulative seconds per liquidity at each time period.
returns.tickCumulatives: Cumulative tick values at each time period

observeTWAP(bytes32,uint32,int24,uint16,.details: External-facing wrapper around `_observeTWAP` for contracts that need the time-weighted average tick.

params.secondsAgo: Seconds in the past to calculate TWAP from

DIRECTORY().notice: The Juicebox directory for terminal lookup

MAX_TWAP_CARDINALITY().notice: Maximum retained observation cardinality for a pool oracle.

MAX_V4_DELTA().notice: Largest output amount that Uniswap V4 can represent in flash-accounting deltas.

PRICES().notice: The Juicebox prices contract for currency conversion

TOKENS().notice: The Juicebox tokens contract for project token lookup

TWAP_PERIOD().notice: TWAP period in seconds (30 minutes by default)

TWAP_SLIPPAGE_DENOMINATOR().notice: The denominator used when calculating TWAP slippage percent values.

afterAddLiquidity(address,(address,addre.notice: The hook called after liquidity is added

afterInitialize(address,(address,address.notice: The hook called after the state of a pool is initialized

afterRemoveLiquidity(address,(address,ad.notice: The hook called after liquidity is removed

afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.notice: The hook called after a swap

beforeAddLiquidity(address,(address,addr.notice: The hook called before liquidity is added

beforeInitialize(address,(address,addres.notice: The hook called before the state of a pool is initialized

beforeRemoveLiquidity(address,(address,a.notice: The hook called before liquidity is removed

beforeSwap(address,(address,address,uint.notice: The hook called before a swap

calculateExpectedOutputFromSelling(uint2.notice: Calculates how many payment tokens (e.g. ETH or USDC) you'd receive from selling project tokens via the Juicebox terminal's cash out mechanism.

calculateExpectedTokensWithCurrency(uint.notice: Estimates how many JB project tokens a user would receive by paying a given amount into the project.

getHookPermissions().notice: Declares which Uniswap V4 lifecycle callbacks this hook uses (afterInitialize, afterSwap, beforeSwap, etc.).

observations(bytes32,uint256).notice: The list of observations for a given pool ID

observe((address,address,uint24,int24,ad.notice: Returns cumulative tick and liquidity-time data for specified lookback periods.

observeTWAP(bytes32,uint32,int24,uint16,.notice: Observe the time-weighted average price (TWAP) tick over the specified lookback window for a pool.

states(bytes32).notice: The current observation array state for the given pool ID
